name: Duce De Leche
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the can of sweetened condensed milk on the rack inside the large pot.
2. Fill the pot with water, ensuring the can is completely covered by at least one inch of water.
3. Bring the water to a boil over high heat.
4. Allow the mixture to simmer for 4 hours.
5. Carefully remove the can from the pot using tongs and let it cool in the refrigerator until ready to use.
6. Once cooled, carefully open one end of the can and invert it onto a plate.
7. Open the other end of the can and slowly pour the caramel through the can onto the plate.
8. The longer you simmer the milk, the richer and browner the pudding will become. Less time will result in a more syrupy consistency.
9. Serve over dessert bread or cookies, or enjoy it on its own. It also works well with frozen desserts as frosting.
Note: Each can contains approximately 1,100 calories. This recipe is best reserved for special occasions due to its high calorie content.
